qry:select.name: qryParam
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select org26.d_valor , org26.c_parametro from org26_parametros as org26 where org26.c_parametro =\'noValidarCerradas\' ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qryDetail
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select PE.c_nro_cuil as e_numero_doc, PE.d_ape_y_nom as d_razon_social , PER01_DP.d_calle + \' \'+ PER01_DP.d_piso + \' \'+ PER01_DP.d_departamento as d_domicilio_fiscal_per , PER01_DP.l_domic_fiscal as domfisc_p , org03_emp.d_domicilio as d_domicilio_fiscal_org , ORG19_Loc.d_localidad as d_localidad , ORG35_PRO.c_provincia_sicore as d_provincia , PER01_DP.c_postal as c_postal_Per , ORG19_Loc.c_postal as c_postal_Loc , 80 as c_tipo_doc
FROM
LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP as PE, PER01_PERSONAL as PER, PER01_DOMIC_PER as PER01_DP, org03_empresas as org03_emp, Org19_LOCALIDADES as ORG19_Loc , ORG35_PROVINCIAS as ORG35_PRO, LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER as TLP, LIQ99_LIQUIDACION as LIQ, LIQ93_EMPRESAS as EMP, LIQ96_CONCEPTOS as LCON, LIQ20_CONC_LIQ_PER as CON, LIQ20_VAR_LIQ_CONC as VAR_LC
JOIN TLP.oi_per_emp_ddo INNER PE.oi_per_emp_ddo , TLP.oi_per_emp_ddo INNER PE.oi_per_emp_ddo , PER.c_personal INNER PE.c_personal , LIQ.oi_liquidacion_ddo INNER TLP.oi_liquidacion_ddo , LIQ.oi_empresa_ddo INNER EMP.oi_empresa_ddo , LCON.oi_concepto_ddo INNER CON.oi_concepto_ddo , TLP.oi_tot_liq_per INNER CON.oi_tot_liq_per , CON.oi_conc_liq_per INNER VAR_LC.oi_conc_liq_per , PER01_DP.oi_personal INNER PER.oi_personal , org03_emp.c_empresa INNER EMP.c_empresa , PER01_DP.oi_localidad INNER ORG19_Loc.oi_localidad , ORG19_Loc.oi_provincia INNER ORG35_PRO.oi_provincia
WHERE LCON.c_concepto = \'99999996\' AND EMP.c_empresa = { #SOURCE:@c_empresa } AND LIQ.e_periodo = { #SOURCE:@p_periodo } {%? (string(#Param_Filtro:@d_valor)!='1') {% AND LIQ.c_estado = \'F\' %} {% %} %}
group by PE.c_nro_cuil , PE.d_ape_y_nom , PER01_DP.d_calle, PER01_DP.d_piso , PER01_DP.d_departamento , PER01_DP.l_domic_fiscal , org03_emp.d_domicilio , ORG19_Loc.d_localidad , ORG35_PRO.c_provincia_sicore, PER01_DP.c_postal , ORG19_Loc.c_postal
')/ROWS/ROW
